mapper.select: SELECT sar.*, e1.realname as original_physician_name, e2.realname as substitute_physician_name, ds.work_date, ds.time_slot, e3.realname as triggered_by_name, e4.realname as confirmed_by_name FROM schedule_adjust_request sar LEFT JOIN doctor_schedule ds ON sar.schedule_id = ds.id LEFT JOIN employee e1 ON sar.old_physician_id = e1.id LEFT JOIN employee e2 ON sar.new_physician_id = e2.id LEFT JOIN employee e3 ON sar.triggered_by = e3.id LEFT JOIN employee e4 ON sar.confirmed_by = e4.id WHERE sar.delmark = 0 ORDER BY sar.create_time DESC

SELECT sar.*, e1.realname as original_physician_name, e2.realname as substitute_physician_name, ds.work_date, ds.time_slot, e3.realname as triggered_by_name, e4.realname as confirmed_by_name FROM schedule_adjust_request sar LEFT JOIN doctor_schedule ds ON sar.schedule_id = ds.id LEFT JOIN employee e1 ON sar.old_physician_id = e1.id LEFT JOIN employee e2 ON sar.new_physician_id = e2.id LEFT JOIN employee e3 ON sar.triggered_by = e3.id LEFT JOIN employee e4 ON sar.confirmed_by = e4.id WHERE sar.id = #{id} AND sar.delmark = 0

SELECT sar.*, e1.realname as original_physician_name, e2.realname as substitute_physician_name, ds.work_date, ds.time_slot, e3.realname as triggered_by_name FROM schedule_adjust_request sar LEFT JOIN doctor_schedule ds ON sar.schedule_id = ds.id LEFT JOIN employee e1 ON sar.old_physician_id = e1.id LEFT JOIN employee e2 ON sar.new_physician_id = e2.id LEFT JOIN employee e3 ON sar.triggered_by = e3.id WHERE sar.status = '待确认' AND sar.delmark = 0 ORDER BY sar.create_time DESC

SELECT sar.*, e1.realname as original_physician_name, e2.realname as substitute_physician_name, e3.realname as triggered_by_name FROM schedule_adjust_request sar LEFT JOIN employee e1 ON sar.old_physician_id = e1.id LEFT JOIN employee e2 ON sar.new_physician_id = e2.id LEFT JOIN employee e3 ON sar.triggered_by = e3.id WHERE sar.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND sar.delmark = 0 ORDER BY sar.create_time DESC

SELECT sar.*, e1.realname as original_physician_name, e2.realname as substitute_physician_name FROM schedule_adjust_request sar LEFT JOIN employee e1 ON sar.old_physician_id = e1.id LEFT JOIN employee e2 ON sar.new_physician_id = e2.id WHERE sar.triggered_by = #{triggeredBy} AND sar.delmark = 0 ORDER BY sar.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule_adjust_request ( schedule_id, adjust_type, old_physician_id, new_physician_id, old_status, new_status, old_quota, new_quota, reason, ai_suggestion, affect_patients, triggered_by, status, delmark ) VALUES ( #{scheduleId}, #{adjustType}, #{oldPhysicianId}, #{newPhysicianId}, #{oldStatus}, #{newStatus}, #{oldQuota}, #{newQuota}, #{reason}, #{aiSuggestion}, #{affectPatients}, #{triggeredBy}, #{status}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule_adjust_request SET delmark = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
